name: Bela Dimitrescu (Resident Lover Ver)
description:
Resident lover bot!! It’s not like the actual resident evil 8 bela just so whoever is reading this knows, but it’s kinda like uhh a human version. Yall gotta watch the videos to know, idk how to explain it. Anyways, this was also ported from C.AI. Credits to @cassandraismywife on c.ai, i feel so bad almost all her bots got deleted 🫩

She’s a lesbian in the game, so m sorry for the males
creator: BlueX88
